author: CasaOS Team
description: SickChill is an automatic Video Library Manager for TV Shows. It watches for new episodes of your favorite shows, and when they are posted it does its magic: automatic torrent/nzb searching, downloading, and processing at the qualities you want.
tagline: Automatic video library manager for TV Shows
release_notes:
- 2023.6.27 has an empty GitHub release body, so changes were checked against the upstream tag compare.
- The compare includes dependency updates for Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk, and types-setuptools.
- Fixes and updates include site-message dismissal, minimum leech time, TL category cleanup, generic.py, torrentleech.py, and bencode logging handling.
title: Sickchill
